title: IAA promotional materials
body: "The Immigration Advice Authority (IAA) has created digital versions of a poster and a print-friendly leaflet, available in multiple sizes.  These resources are designed to inform advice seekers about the IAA’s services and provide guidance on what to do if they have concerns about their adviser or the services provided.  The materials are also available in 26 languages:   Albanian Arabic Bengali Bulgarian Chinese (Simplified) Dari Farsi French Hindi Kurdish Pashto Polish Portuguese Punjabi (Indian) Punjabi (Western) Romanian Russian Somali Spanish Tamil Ukrainian Urdu Vietnamese Amharic Tigrinya Traditional Chinese  "
